# XCTOSSignpostMetric

**Class**

A metric to record the time that a performance test spends executing a signposted region of code.

## Declaration

```swift
class XCTOSSignpostMetric
```

## Overview

This metric captures the time that elapses between the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/os/OSSignpostType/begin] and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/os/OSSignpostType/end] events for a specific named [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/os/os_signpost(_:dso:log:name:signpostID:)-2oz8u] region. It doesn’t record any results when there isn’t a matching pair of `begin` and `end` events.

## Measuring Specific Signposts

- **init(subsystem:category:name:)**: Creates a metric to record a specific signpost.

## Measuring Navigation Transitions

- **customNavigationTransitionMetric**: A metric that records the duration of custom navigation transitions between views.
- **navigationTransitionMetric**: A metric that records the duration of navigation transitions between views.

## Measuring Scrolling Properties

- **scrollingAndDecelerationMetric**: A metric that records scroll-dragging and deceleration animations.

## Deprecated

- **applicationLaunch**: A metric that records the time that elapses during app launch.
- **scrollDecelerationMetric**: A metric that records scroll deceleration animations.
- **scrollDraggingMetric**: A metric that records scroll-dragging animations.

## Measurement Metrics

- **XCTMetric**: A protocol that defines the methods that objects must provide when gathering metrics during performance tests.
- **XCTCPUMetric**: A metric to record information about CPU activity during a performance test.
- **XCTClockMetric**: A metric to record the time that elapses during a performance test.
- **XCTHitchMetric**: A metric to measure the number of hitches your UI encounters in a performance test.
- **XCTMemoryMetric**: A metric to record the physical memory that a performance test uses.
- **XCTStorageMetric**: A metric to record the amount of data that a performance test logically writes to storage.
- **XCTApplicationLaunchMetric**: A metric to record the application launch duration for a performance test.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
- XCTMetric
